status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
addr: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
searchbar: margin: 0 16px 12px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--surface); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 0 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 15px;
pill: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 500px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap;
rphoto: width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; border-radius: 12px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
ribbon: position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: var(--green); color: #fff; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 999px;
heart: position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
rmeta: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;
cart-count: width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; color: var(--green); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
cart-label: flex: 1; text-align: center; color: #fff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; gap: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; position: relative;
